site.name: Punaoa Fa'aliliu
site.defaultDescription: Fa'amaumauga mo le Resource Translator GitHub Action — otometi masini fa'aliliuga o punaoa faila e ala i le Azure AI Translator.

search.title: Saili pepa o faamatalaga
search.idleHelp: Su'e tusiga e ala i autu, fa'atulagaga o faila, filifiliga fa'atulagaina, po'o le fua. Fa'aaoga {up} {down} e fa'atautaia ai, {enter} tatalaina.
search.empty: Leai ni taunuuga. Taumafai se isi upu autu.
search.error: E le mafai ona maua le search index i le dev. Fa'atautaia se gaosiga fausiaina.

backToTop.label: Tusi i le pito i luga

footer.sourceAria: Va'ai punaoa i luga o GitHub
footer.marketplaceAria: Va'ai i luga o le GitHub Marketplace
footer.taglinePrefix: O se GitHub Action e fa'aliliuina ai au faila punaoa otometi, fausia i luga o le aloaia
